holdings.infoBox: RWO is an equity ETF with a total of 242 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 8.79%, Prologis at 8.17%, Equinix at 6.19%, Simon Property Group at 4.15%, and Digital Realty Trust at 3.53%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Dow Jones Global Real Estate ETF (RWO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks a cap-weighted index of global REITs and real estate companies. The fund invests across the market-cap spectrum. RWO was launched on May 7, 2008 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: DJ Global Select Real Estate Securities Index (RESI)
